name: @repo/package-template
description: TypeScript monorepo template with vitest, turbo, husky, and changesets

scripts.lint:attw: pnpm turbo run @deessejs/type-testing#build && attw --pack packages/type-testing --ignore-rules no-resolution cjs-resolves-to-esm --format table
scripts.check:packaging: pnpm lint:publint && pnpm lint:attw && pnpm lint:sherif
scripts.release: changesets version && pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && git add .
